rationale: Gov't Code §2155.132 governs state agency purchasing thresholds and procedures. It is unrelated to the property tax homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A state agency is delegated the authority to purchase goods and services if the purchase does not exceed $50,000.
_note: The cited rule concerns procurement delegation and bears no relation to homestead exemption levels.
